final_prompt.prompt:
Create a still-life photograph of a wabi-sabi composition (any in-image text in Chinese, if rendered).

Style/medium: needs a "侘寂" aesthetic — references in the spirit of wabi-sabi design philosophy, Japanese kintsugi pottery tradition, 16th-century Japanese tea ceremony object arrangement; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: framing is yours
Subject: must include a coarse pottery vase with withered branches (one each)
Scene/backdrop: must include a weathered wooden table with natural window light casting diagonally across the scene
Lighting/mood: needs natural window light with diagonal casting — exact light quality is yours
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: needs imperfect, time-worn surface treatment — exact grain / patina / wear level is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: if any in-image text is rendered, default to Chinese
Avoid:
